notes: Post-repair recheck pins 46 unique current products across ten ordered sections from the March 2025 U.S. guide, with Fountain Drinks last.
All 37 frozen rows remain reconciled exactly once: 3 exact, 2 normalized, 16 current variants, 5 process artifacts, and 11 stale products.

Thirty-nine products preserve direct contains signals from the current guide's allergen matrix; seven fountain products are explicitly represented as global-note-only rather than assigned unsupported direct allergens.
Every current product carries the exact page-one may-contain set: egg, fish, milk, peanut, sesame, shellfish, soy, tree nut, and wheat. Gluten is not inferred.
The reconstruction combines the current nutrition tables, direct allergen matrix, and global warning without treating components or preparation states as consumer products.
The revised-May-2016 chart remains archived comparison evidence only and is no longer a configured production source.

findings.summary: The frozen record relies on a chart explicitly revised in 2016 instead of the current March 2025 U.S. guide.
findings.resolution: Replaced the configured source set with the current March 2025 restaurant-issued U.S. guide and retained the 2016 chart only as audit comparison evidence.

findings.summary: The frozen 37-row component abstraction does not represent the current 46-product consumer catalog.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt and pinned all 46 current consumer products across ten sections; removed five process artifacts and eleven stale products.

findings.summary: Every frozen row omits the current guide's all-food-and-beverage nine-allergen cross-contact warning.
findings.resolution: Applied the exact nine-member may-contain set to every current product without translating wheat into gluten.

findings.summary: Eight retained or renamed frozen concepts have direct contains signals that differ from the current matrix.
findings.resolution: Replaced all direct signals with the current 39-product matrix and retained seven fountain products as global-note-only rows.

repairs.summary: Verified the complete current 46-product catalog, direct matrix semantics, global cross-contact semantics, removal of stale products and artifacts, and absence of inferred gluten.
verificationCommands: node --test --test-name-pattern="Auntie Anne's uses the current U.S. guide" scripts/restaurant-pipeline.test.mjs

notes: Targeted audit/reconciliation suite passed 6/6 and the generated-data regression passed 1/1.
Generated snapshot counts: 46 total; 39 direct matrix; 7 official global-note-only; 0 unavailable; all 46 carry the exact nine-allergen may-contain set.
